esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-statsdreceiver-default
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "statsdreceiver"
| WHERE envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters IS NOT NULL
// Warming clusters should drop to 0 after config load; sustained > 0 indicates config issues
| STATS max_warming = MAX(envoy.cluster_manager.warming_clusters)
| WHERE max_warming > 0
